name: Michman Besd Ltd
summary: MICHMAN BESD LTD engages in the provision of finance against the receipt of deferred credits written by third parties in favor of the company. It services credits with collaterals, including the encumbrance of real estate assets, vehicles, guarantees, tools, engineering equipment, etc. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Bnei Brak, Israel.
